items.title: D.C. Cracks Down on Ticket Resellers: Council Passes Bill to Protect Fans From Scammers, Inflated Prices
items.summary: The RESALE Act would cap resale prices, ban speculative ticketing, require ticket resellers to acquire licenses and more.

items.title: Dry Cleaning Share Three New Tracks On Secret Love (Deluxe Edition)
items.summary: Dry Cleaning's Cate Le Bon-produced Secret Love dropped six months ago, and today the band has given us the deluxe edition. On this expanded version of the album, you'll find three bonus tracks. One of them, "Sliced By A Fingernail," was released at the dawn of spring.

items.title: Skullcrusher Covers Tim Buckley For Sounds Of Saving
items.summary: By their own description, the nonprofit Sounds Of Saving "designs and provides tools, content, resources, and curriculum to young people, ages 14 to 24, on how to discover and utilize music to support their mental health and wellness." They have a music series called Song That Found Me At The Right Time, which today features a contribution from Skullcrusher, fresh off last fall's album And Your Song Is Like A Circle.

items.title: Robyn Covers Erasure For BBC Radio 2
items.summary: Robyn is still making the rounds in the long tail of her Sexistential campaign. Today, that path has carried her to BBC Radio 2's studios for a performance on Jo Whiley's Sofa Sessions. In addition to album tracks "Dopamine," "Sucker For Love," and "Talk To Me," she broke out a cover of Erasure's 1994 synth-pop ballad "Always." Her treatment is faithful to the original while sounding distinctively Robyn-esque.
